full_text:
Sun Huan (Jiming) 孫奐 (季明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Huan (孫奐), styledJiming (季明), was born in Wu. Captured three Wei generals at Shiyang. Encouraged scholarship in his lands. Sun Huan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Huan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
